phoneticUs: 藞vend蕣; 藞vendj蕣; ven藞d蕣; 藞v藞dj蕣
examples: I stopped my horse lately where a great number of people were collected at a vendue of merchant goods.
Commercial Banks should also try various new methods to actively dispose bad loans, including clearing up loans, vendue, write off bad debts and so on.
The effective approach to resolve mine disasters is that of mining rights should be owned by vendue and the implement of mining rights should be safeguard by cruel torture and severe law.
